import React from "react"; import { LinearGradient } from "expo-linear-gradient"; export default function WhySection({ onOpenDemo }) { return (
{/* Background */}

Why CineGate

Public film licensing redesigned for African cinema.

{/* Card 1 */}

Public screenings{`\n`}are complicated

  • › Licensing is unclear
  • › Negotiations are slow
  • › Many venues screen films informally
{/* Card 2 (highlight) */}

Pay once.{`\n`} Screen once.

  • › Download licensed film
  • › Screen it one time
  • › Access automatically expires
{/* Card 3 */}

More African films{`\n`}on more screens

  • › Legal access for venues
  • › Revenue for filmmakers
  • › Cultural visibility globally

Experience the one-time screening model

{/* Responsive tweak (3 cols -> 1 col) */}
); } const S = { section: { position: "relative", padding: "82px 18px 92px", color: "#fff", overflow: "hidden", backgroundColor: "#060606", fontFamily: 'Montserrat, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif', }, bgWrap: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, backgroundImage: "url(/assets/why_section_bg.png)", backgroundSize: "cover", backgroundPosition: "center", transform: "scale(1.02)", filter: "saturate(1.06) contrast(1.03)", }, // ✅ Brighter than before (your old overlay was too heavy) bgOverlay: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: "radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.45) 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.58) 100%)", }, bgVignetteTop: { position: "absolute", left: 0, right: 0, top: 0, height: 160, background: "linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.62), rgba(0,0,0,0))", }, bgVignetteBottom: { position: "absolute", left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, height: 220, background: "linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.62), rgba(0,0,0,0))", }, inner: { position: "relative", zIndex: 2, maxWidth: 1100, margin: "0 auto", textAlign: "center", }, // ✅ Smaller + cleaner like mockup title: { fontSize: 54, margin: 0, fontWeight: 800, letterSpacing: "-0.6px", }, subtitle: { marginTop: 10, marginBottom: 0, fontSize: 18, opacity: 0.75, }, grid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr))", gap: 26, // ✅ more breathing room like mockup marginTop: 34, }, // ✅ Thin frame + subtle glow, not thick dark block cardFrame: { borderRadius: 18, padding: 1, background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.10) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 100%)", boxShadow: "0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, cardFrameHot: { background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(240,154,43,0.55) 0%, rgba(240,154,43,0.18) 48%, rgba(255,255,255,0.07) 100%)", boxShadow: "0 22px 70px rgba(240,154,43,0.14), 0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, // ✅ More transparent so the background texture shows through card: { borderRadius: 18, padding: "30px 22px 24px", minHeight: 340, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.22)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", backdropFilter: "blur(3px)", }, cardHot: { background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.16)", border: "1px solid rgba(240,154,43,0.16)", }, icon: { width: 70, height: 70, objectFit: "contain", marginBottom: 14, filter: "drop-shadow(0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.55))", }, // ✅ Smaller than your current output and closer to mockup cardTitle: { margin: 0, fontSize: 26, fontWeight: 800, lineHeight: 1.15, whiteSpace: "pre-line", }, orange: { color: "#F09A2B" }, divider: { height: 1, margin: "18px auto 0", width: "86%", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", }, dividerHot: { height: 1, margin: "18px auto 0", width: "86%", background: "rgba(240,154,43,0.22)", }, list: { listStyle: "none", padding: 0, margin: "16px auto 0", maxWidth: 340, textAlign: "left", }, // ✅ Lighter text like mockup (yours was too bold/bright) li: { display: "flex", gap: 12, alignItems: "flex-start", padding: "12px 0", fontSize: 18, opacity: 0.82, borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", }, chev: { color: "#F09A2B", fontWeight: 900, lineHeight: "18px", marginTop: 2, }, ctaHint: { marginTop: 36, marginBottom: 16, fontSize: 18, opacity: 0.65, }, // ✅ button placement + size like mockup ctaBtnWrap: { border: 0, background: "transparent", padding: 0, cursor: "pointer", borderRadius: 12, display: "inline-block", marginTop: 4, boxShadow: "0 16px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, ctaBtn: { borderRadius: 12, padding: "16px 28px", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)", overflow: "hidden", }, ctaTopHighlight: { position: "absolute", left: 1, right: 1, top: 1, height: 18, borderTopLeftRadius: 12, borderTopRightRadius: 12, backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.14)", }, ctaRow: { display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", gap: 14, }, ctaPlay: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 900, marginTop: 1, }, ctaText: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 800, letterSpacing: "0.2px", }, };
